Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Privilege Log, And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MENG LI'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, PRIVILEGE LOG, AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Vicki F. Van Fleet, Esq. of Newdorf Legal for pltf & moving party; Patrick L. Hurley, Esq. & Tom Trapani, Esq. of Manning & Marder Kass, Ellrod, Ramirez LLP 217-6990 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - Granted. Macy's West Stores, Inc. is ordered to provide supplemental responses and a privilege log within 30 days of notice of this order. Reasonable sanctions in the amount of $4000 shall be paid by counsel for Macy's West Stores, Inc. to plaintiff. C.C.P. Sections 2030.300 and 2031.310. Parties cannot agree on a proposed form of order, will each submit their own or disputed issues. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
